rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout
rawCommits.body:
Add new AURA 3D app to the app registry with Box icon at /3d route.
Three-tab studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize) with stub content,
left nav for asset history, and Zustand store for app state. Adds
three.js dependency for upcoming WebGL 3D model viewer.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add image generation flow with sidekick panels
rawCommits.body:
Replace tab-based layout with simplified single-page flow: image
generation on top, 3D model section below. Wire SSE image generation
stream with style lock prompt. Add sidekick with Images and Models
tabs for asset management. Model selector follows ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Remove old tab stubs (ImagineTab, GenerateTab,
TokenizeTab).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add image generation flow with sidekick panels

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow
rawCommits.body:
Create Three.js scene with 4-light rig, GLTF model loader with
auto-center/scale, and WebGLViewer component with full lifecycle
cleanup. Wire 3D generation SSE stream via Tripo. Add viewer
controls for grid, wireframe, and texture toggling. Source image
auto-populates from image generation.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add project selector, feature flag, and store tests
rawCommits.body:
Add project selector dropdown to left nav matching ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Gate AURA 3D app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D
feature flag. Add 9 unit tests covering store state transitions,
generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add project selector, feature flag, and store tests

rawCommits.subject: fix(generation): handle upstream SSE frames without event line
rawCommits.body:
The aura-router sends generation events as data-only frames
(data: {"type":"start",...}) without a separate event: line.
The proxy was silently dropping these. Now extracts the type
from the JSON data field when no event line is present.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: handle upstream SSE frames without event line

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish
rawCommits.body:
Add IMAGE section title matching 3D MODEL header. Add click-to-expand
lightbox overlay for generated images with backdrop close and X button.
Set 50/50 split between image and model sections. Center empty state
content. Remove unused search placeholder from registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix
rawCommits.body:
Replace horizontal split with Image/3D Model tabs per feedback.
Use LeftMenuTree from features/left-menu for left nav consistency
with Projects app. Remove section title headers (tabs replace them).
Fix SSE proxy to extract event type from JSON data field when
upstream omits the event line. Update empty state text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): use project tree nav matching Projects app
rawCommits.body:
Replace custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree showing projects
as expandable groups. Clicking a project expands it and selects it.
Generated images appear as children under the active project. Matches
the Projects app left nav pattern exactly.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use project tree nav matching Projects app

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence backend
rawCommits.body:
Add StorageProjectArtifact and CreateProjectArtifactRequest types
to aura-os-storage with client methods for list, create, get, and
delete. Proxy handlers in aura-os-server forward to aura-storage
with JWT auth. Routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts and
/api/artifacts/:id.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence backend

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence to store
rawCommits.body:
Add artifacts API client and wire persistence into the store. On
project select, load artifacts from aura-storage and convert to
store types. Strip style lock suffix from stored prompts for display.
Link images to models via sourceImageId/parentId. Artifact save is
handled by the router — frontend only loads and maps.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence to store

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls
rawCommits.body:
Left nav shows images and models with icons under each project,
with prefixed IDs for correct selection dispatch. Sidekick panels
use thumbnail grid for both images and models with section headings.
Viewer controls replaced with icon toggle buttons. Generate 3D
button hidden when model already loaded. Progress messages cycle
during generation. Image preview enlarged and source image
shown full-size.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): wire parentId chain and require project selection
rawCommits.body:
Capture artifactId from image SSE completed event and pass it as
parentId when generating 3D. Proxy forwards parentId to the router
so model artifacts link to their source image. Disable prompt input
and Generate 3D button when no project is selected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: wire parentId chain and require project selection

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app
rawCommits.body:
Remove VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag and isAura3DEnabled check.
AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app

rawCommits.subject: fix(aura3d): move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404
rawCommits.body:
Artifact routes in process_routes were shadowed by axum router
merge — GET returned 404 while OPTIONS passed via CORS. Moving
to project_routes where all /api/projects/:project_id routes
live resolves the trie conflict.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404

rendered.title: AURA 3D studio debuts alongside nightly release hardening
rendered.intro: Today's nightly ships the first end-to-end cut of AURA 3D — a new studio for generating images and turning them into textured 3D models inside a WebGL viewer — along with a meaningful round of hardening for the nightly release pipeline and changelog media tooling. Desktop builds landed across macOS, Windows, and Linux.

entries.title: Nightly asset pruning and gh-pages recovery hardening
entries.summary: The nightly release workflow got a more resilient asset-cleanup path and a dedicated recovery route for changelog media publishing.

items.text: Replaced the inline nightly asset cleanup with a retrying prune script that tolerates missing releases and missing assets, so nightly runs no longer fail on transient GitHub API hiccups or a deleted nightly tag.
Added a Sync Release Changelog Media History workflow plus a gh-pages republish recovery workflow, giving the team a repeatable way to reconcile changelog media to gh-pages after a failed publish.
Reworked changelog media publishing to sync into dated history entries and tightened the framing and readability of generated media cards.

media.reason: Entirely CI/release workflow and script hardening (nightly prune, gh-pages republish, changelog media history sync). No user-visible product surface; a static screenshot cannot prove retry logic or workflow resilience.
reasons: Entirely CI/release workflow and script hardening (nightly prune, gh-pages republish, changelog media history sync). No user-visible product surface; a static screenshot cannot prove retry logic or workflow resilience.
entry only touches release or infrastructure files
entry language only weakly hints at a visible product surface
entry language points to runtime or infrastructure plumbing rather than a stable screen
entry language points to release plumbing rather than a product screen

media.storyTitle: Nightly asset pruning and gh-pages recovery hardening

entries.title: GPT-5.5 support and sharper AI-driven changelog proofs
entries.summary: Chat gained a new top-tier model option while the automated changelog-media pipeline got a stricter proofing pass with crisper, larger proof screenshots.

items.text: Added GPT-5.5 as a selectable model in the chat input bar, with matching benchmark pricing entries and server-side dev loop handling.

Introduced a tool-driven media inference pass (prompt v4) that decides which changelog entries actually warrant a screenshot, rejecting CI, backend-only, and non-visual work instead of producing weak proofs.
Preserved crisp, higher-resolution proof screenshots and enlarged the branded proof cards so published changelog media reads clearly at final size.
Server now reports ZERO Pro status alongside usage on the dev loop handler so downstream clients can reflect entitlement state.

media.reason: The GPT-5.5 model addition surfaces in the ChatInputBar model picker dropdown — a single screenshot of the open model selector can clearly prove the new option. Other items (media proofing pipeline, ZERO Pro status reporting) are backend/tooling and not screenshot-worthy.
reasons: The GPT-5.5 model addition surfaces in the ChatInputBar model picker dropdown — a single screenshot of the open model selector can clearly prove the new option. Other items (media proofing pipeline, ZERO Pro status reporting) are backend/tooling and not screenshot-worthy.

media.storyTitle: GPT-5.5 in the Chat Input Model Picker

entries.title: AURA 3D app: image-to-model studio takes shape
entries.summary: A brand new AURA 3D app landed, moving from a tab scaffold to a working image generation flow and a WebGL-backed 3D viewer gated behind a feature flag.

items.text: Scaffolded AURA 3D at /3d in the app registry with a Box-icon entry, Zustand store, and initial Imagine/Generate/Tokenize tab layout, and pulled in three.js for the upcoming viewer.
Replaced the tab stubs with a single-page image generation flow driven by an SSE stream and a style-locked prompt, plus a sidekick panel with Images and Models tabs for asset management.

Added a Three.js WebGL viewer with a 4-light rig, GLTF auto-center/scale loader, grid/wireframe/texture toggles, and wired a Tripo-backed 3D generation SSE stream that auto-populates the source image from the image step.

Added a project selector dropdown in the left nav, gated the whole app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D, and backed the store with nine unit tests covering state transitions, completion, selection, and error handling.

media.reason: Brand-new AURA 3D app with a visible studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize tabs, left nav, image generation flow, WebGL 3D viewer). Highly screenshot-worthy — a single capture of the studio clearly proves the new surface.
reasons: Brand-new AURA 3D app with a visible studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize tabs, left nav, image generation flow, WebGL 3D viewer). Highly screenshot-worthy — a single capture of the studio clearly proves the new surface.

entries.title: Generation proxy now handles data-only SSE frames
entries.summary: Fixed a silent drop in the generation proxy when upstream sent SSE frames without an explicit event line.

items.text: The aura-os-server generation handler now extracts the event type from the JSON data field when the upstream router emits data-only SSE frames, so start/progress/completed events no longer get silently dropped.

media.reason: Backend SSE proxy fix in generation.rs to parse event type from JSON data field. No visible UI change; a screenshot cannot prove that previously-dropped events now flow through.
reasons: Backend SSE proxy fix in generation.rs to parse event type from JSON data field. No visible UI change; a screenshot cannot prove that previously-dropped events now flow through.

entries.title: AURA 3D layout switches to tabs and project-tree navigation
entries.summary: Based on feedback, the studio layout moved from a vertical split to Image/3D Model tabs and adopted the shared Projects-app left menu tree.

items.text: Replaced the horizontal image/model split with Image and 3D Model tabs and removed the redundant section headers, giving the studio a more familiar app-shell layout.
Swapped the custom project dropdown for LeftMenuTree so AURA 3D's left nav matches the Projects app, with generated images appearing as children under the active project.
Added a click-to-expand lightbox for generated images with backdrop and X-button close, plus a centered empty state and IMAGE section header for parity with the 3D MODEL section.

media.reason: Visible layout overhaul of AURA 3D: Image / 3D Model tabs replace the split, LeftMenuTree project nav, lightbox preview, and IMAGE/3D MODEL section headers. A single screenshot clearly shows the new tabbed shell and tree nav.
reasons: Visible layout overhaul of AURA 3D: Image / 3D Model tabs replace the split, LeftMenuTree project nav, lightbox preview, and IMAGE/3D MODEL section headers. A single screenshot clearly shows the new tabbed shell and tree nav.

entries.title: Artifact persistence and general availability for AURA 3D
entries.summary: AURA 3D now persists generated images and models to aura-storage, links models back to their source image, and is turned on for everyone.

items.text: Added a project artifacts backend in aura-os-storage and aura-os-server with list/create/get/delete endpoints at /api/projects/:id/artifacts, and resolved a router trie conflict that was causing GETs to 404 while OPTIONS passed.

Wired the store to load a project's artifacts on selection, captured the image artifact ID from the SSE completed event, and passed it as parentId so generated 3D models link back to their source image.

Polished the studio shell: images and models now show under each project with icons in the left nav, sidekick panels use a thumbnail grid with headings, viewer controls became icon toggles, and the Generate 3D button hides once a model is loaded.
Removed the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag so AURA 3D is now always available in the app registry, and disabled prompt input until a project is selected.

media.reason: Visible polish: sidekick thumbnail grid with headings, icon toggle viewer controls, images/models under projects in left nav with icons, and AURA 3D now always available (no flag). A single screenshot of the polished studio can prove the sidekick grid + left-nav tree with artifacts. Backend artifact API is not visible but the UI consequences are.
reasons: Visible polish: sidekick thumbnail grid with headings, icon toggle viewer controls, images/models under projects in left nav with icons, and AURA 3D now always available (no flag). A single screenshot of the polished studio can prove the sidekick grid + left-nav tree with artifacts. Backend artifact API is not visible but the UI consequences are.

Artifact persistence wires generations to projects
Nightly release pruning and gh-pages recovery hardened
